supersedes: v1.5 (review cycle 6, 2026-07-17: WITHHELD, 16 findings — central gap: Phase B + attestation not wired into the executable path).
status: DRAFT. Closure taxonomy: CLOSED_IN_CODE / CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST / OPEN_IN_IMAGE / OPEN_AT_COMMIT / OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE / OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION. No Stage-3 instance has been run.

input_contract.note: now a bound governance artifact with semantic-equivalence verification vs stage3_cascade.INPUT_CONTRACT

corrections_from_review_v6.1_entry_never_loads_phase_b: CLOSED_IN_CODE — run_clean_successor REQUIRES MR002_EXECUTION_BINDING(+_SHA256), MR002_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION, MR002_REALISM_PASS, MR002_FINAL_TEST_REPORT before preflight; loads + cross-validates all of them; the designed boundary is now the enforced boundary
corrections_from_review_v6.2_attestation_loader_unused: CLOSED_IN_CODE — load_launch_attestation is a mandatory entry precondition; its hash comes from the BINDING (not a separate operator channel)
corrections_from_review_v6.3_no_cross_validation: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — cross_validate_binding compares every binding hash against the ACTUAL artifact bytes (authorization/pins/Phase-A manifest/attestation/package/realism-PASS/final-test-report) and requires binding==authorization==attestation identity equality (commit/tree/image/OCI)
corrections_from_review_v6.4_phase_b_schema_incomplete: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — version 1.0, record_status IMMUTABLE, countersigner exact, ISO countersigned_date (real calendar), repository enforced
corrections_from_review_v6.5_signature_not_verified: PARTIALLY CLOSED / OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION — the signature ENVELOPE (signature_algorithm, signing_key_id, canonical_signed_payload_sha256, verification_tool) is now required + validated; cryptographic verification by the named frozen tool against the trusted key remains the launcher-side deliverable
corrections_from_review_v6.6_contract_json_not_bound: CLOSED_IN_CODE — the contract JSON is a governance artifact (sha256+blob+length) AND verify_source checks it is semantically EQUAL to stage3_cascade.INPUT_CONTRACT (INPUT_CONTRACT_ARTIFACT_DRIFT)
corrections_from_review_v6.7_truncated_hash_in_package: CLOSED — this package carries complete 64-hex hashes only
corrections_from_review_v6.8_day_provenance_unbound: CLOSED_IN_CODE — the entry consumes production_corpus_source.last_provenance (pre-capture observation) and REFUSES a PASS verdict if it is missing
corrections_from_review_v6.9_db_reobserved: CLOSED_IN_CODE — the pre-capture db_prov is what reaches the evidence; the re-observing _database_provenance call was removed from the provenance path
corrections_from_review_v6.10_lifecycle_undocumented: DOCUMENTED — the frozen 9-step Phase-A→Phase-B lifecycle is recorded in the review README + binding docstrings; steps 8-9 are now executable because the entry enforces Phase B
corrections_from_review_v6.11_harness_double_observation: OPEN_IN_IMAGE (acknowledged) — the single-snapshot refactor of gather_env is scheduled with the in-image run; the gate report remains the authoritative pass basis
corrections_from_review_v6.12_fail_doc_claims_persistence_early: CLOSED_IN_CODE — the FAIL document starts evidence_persisted=false and flips to true only inside the exact persisted payload
corrections_from_review_v6.13_dir_fsync_silent: ACKNOWLEDGED — directory-fsync is best-effort on Windows dev; the in-image (Linux) runs get true dir-fsync; honesty note retained rather than a false flag
corrections_from_review_v6.14_hashes_not_format_checked: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — _require_hex64: 64-hex for hashes, 40-hex for commit/tree, sha256:<64hex> for image/OCI, in binding AND attestation
corrections_from_review_v6.16_derivation_evidence: OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE (documentation) — the expression-level derivation artifact mapping code locations to clauses accompanies the final adjudication package

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION: produce + cryptographically sign the attestation with the frozen tool/key registry
OPEN_AT_COMMIT: final implementation commit + tree; regenerate Phase-A manifest + test report there
OPEN_IN_IMAGE: full OCI digest; realism-harness PASS; final test report with the production-binding test RUN; single-snapshot harness runtime
OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE: countersigned pins + authorization + Phase-B binding artifacts; the expression-level contract-derivation document
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
